title: Caldera - WinRM Lateral Movement via Evil-WinRM from Linux
description: Detects use of Evil-WinRM or Python WinRM clients from Linux hosts for lateral movement to Windows targets. Caldera T1021.006 emulation connects to WinRM (port 5985/5986) on Windows machines in the GOAD network using stolen credentials or pass-the-hash to execute commands remotely.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*evil-winrm*' or msg like '*evil_winrm*')) or ((msg like '*winrm.Protocol*' or msg like '*winrm.Session*' or msg like '*pywinrm*')) or ( ((msg like '*:5985*' or msg like '*:5986*')) and ((msg like '*-u *' or msg like '*-p *' or msg like '*-H *' or msg like '*--hash*')) ))
falsepositives: Authorized Windows administration from Linux jump hosts
IT teams using WinRM for cross-platform management
